result: Native overset dual-lens chart transfer generates the finite Fourier/Weil_F generator for N=8 and N=12 exactly after sealing; it preserves same-chart diagonal trace; it does not generate the Weil_G quadratic diagonal.
native_transfer_law: Let sigma_N be the orientation successor induced by W_r -> W_{r+1}. The plus chart is point orientation basis e_r. The minus chart is the normalized eigen-cochain basis chi_s of sigma_N. Transfer coefficient K_N(r,s)=chi_s(e_r).
phase6_fork: continue inside Phase 5 v1 until Gauss diagonal is derived or boundary is located
